Matthew J. Witteman for plaintiff and moving party Laura Roccia
Anita Mohan for defendant and opposing party MJB LLC, Mark Rennie, Terence Alan and 34 Mason Street LLC

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents (#1 and #2), form and special interrogatories (#1 and #2) is granted. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections, other than those based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges or the right to privacy, within 15 days of notice of this order. As answers may have been served after the filing of the instant motion, the Court makes no rulings as to the adequacy of said responses. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid by defendants within 15 days of notice of this order. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to limiting the scope of the requested discovery. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
